code: import axios from'axios';const API_URL='http://localhost:5032/api/GameStats';export const GetGameStats=async()=>{try{const response=await axios.get("".concat(API_URL));return response.data;}catch(error){console.error("Error fetching data: ",error);}};export const GetPlayerGameStats=async playerId=>{try{const url=API_URL+'/';const response=await axios.get(url+playerId);return response.data;}catch(error){console.error("Error fetching data: ",error);}};export const GetSeasonGameStats=async seasonId=>{try{const url=API_URL+'/Season/';const response=await axios.get(url+seasonId);return response.data;}catch(error){console.error("Error fetching data: ",error);}};export const GetSeasonGameStatsForPlayer=async _ref=>{let{seasonId,playerId}=_ref;try{const url=API_URL+'/';const response=await axios.get(url+seasonId+","+playerId);return response.data;}catch(error){console.error("Error fetching data: ",error);}};export const GetFixtureGameStats=async fixtureId=>{try{const url=API_URL+'/Fixture/';const response=await axios.get(url+fixtureId);return response.data;}catch(error){console.error("Error fetching data: ",error);}};
